creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Kyle Evans from comment #6)

Possibly none. It was just an oddity of the context
and I do not know its consequences or if FreeBSD
handles the lack of uniformity (new type of territory
for me).

If things go well, I may be able to try things for
myself before the end of the weekend. That might have
a chance of producing something more useful, say some
truss output showing the specific type of call that
gets the ENOSYS (if I do get such).
